Shyft Integration  New firm operative  since day 1  Set - up for growth  Successful go - live of  new products and  locations to fuel  growth  FY 2025 highlights  March 19, 2026  Q4 and FY 2025 Earnings Call | Aebi Schmidt Group   23  Outperforming on  synergies  ≥$40m expected  synergies vs pre -  merger target of  $25m to $30m

public  A significantly amplified quarterly seasonality is expected in 2026, given the  market and geopolitical conditions  24  March 19, 2026  Q4 and FY 2025 Earnings Call | Aebi Schmidt Group  Slow Start in Q1  ▪   Strong   Walk - in - Van   orders and  backlog converting into revenue  beyond the quarter  ▪   Early recovery signals in  commercial , not yet compensating  for an overall soft market  ▪   Geopolitical   developments driving  uncertainty  Strong year end in Q4  ▪   Seasonally the strongest quarter,  supported by strong   market  demand  ▪   Solid Q4 performance, particularly  in   Europe and RoW , driven by the  winter business  Order conversion in Q2  ▪   Conversion of   Walk - in - Van  backlog into revenue  ▪   Chicago super center   fully  operational and utilized  ▪   Other new locations ramping up  production   and   upfitting   output  Market and synergies improving in Q3  ▪   Realization of merger   procurement  synergies  ▪   Expected   Commercial   and   Fleet  market recovery  ~45% of Net Sales and ~40% of Profitability in H1/2026   ~55% of Net Sales and ~60% of Profitability in H2/2026

public  2026 focus is to sustain the positive momentum achieved in 2025, reflected  in market guidance of Net Sales, Adj
